demo_headline: Control case: conservative care and duration are largely documented — the agent does not invent spoken_only gaps.

criteria.label: Symptom duration ≥ 6 weeks
criteria.summary: Note documents ~six years of chronic low back pain.

evidence.quoted_span: Chronic low back pain, present about six years, is a dull ache across the beltline
Same one, going on six years now.

criteria.label: Failed / incomplete conservative care ≥ 6 weeks
criteria.summary: Stretching and heat in both transcript and note.

evidence.quoted_span: Stretching helps some. Heat helps more.

criteria.label: NSAID / analgesic trial
criteria.summary: Patient reports running out of home analgesics months ago; new acetaminophen prescribed today. Prior trial details need confirmation.

evidence.quoted_span: I ran out of everything months ago and stopped refilling when the insurance switched over to my wife's plan.
evidence.supports: Home meds depleted — prior regimen unclear

evidence.quoted_span: Acetaminophen 325 mg oral tablets (Tylenol) prescribed for scheduled rather than crisis use

artifact.title: Verification task — prior analgesic regimen
artifact.body: Confirm which analgesic/NSAID was used before the insurance change, approximate duration, and response — patient-reported gap.

evidence.quoted_span: He denies radicular pain, numbness, tingling, weakness, and bowel or bladder dysfunction.

criteria.label: Functional limitation
criteria.summary: Aggravation with job-application sitting and stair laundry carrying documented.

evidence.quoted_span: aggravated by prolonged sitting during job applications and by carrying laundry up three flights of stairs

fhir_gap_callout.title: Mostly documented control
fhir_gap_callout.detail: Use this encounter to show Praxess does not force spoken_only labels when the note already carries payer-grade detail.

packet_draft.title: Draft prior authorization packet — Lumbar MRI
